passage_title: Trends in the Indian fashion and textile industries

sentences.sentence: During the 1950s, the Indian fashion scene was exciting, stylish and very graceful.
sentences.translation: 20世纪50年代，印度时尚界令人振奋，既有格调又十分优雅。
difficult_points: exciting、stylish 和 graceful 是并列表语，共同描述当时的时尚风貌。
During the 1950s 是置于句首的时间状语。

sentences.sentence: There were no celebrity designers or models, nor were there any labels that were widely recognised.
sentences.translation: 当时既没有明星设计师或模特，也没有任何广为人知的品牌。

structure.text: There were no celebrity designers or models

difficult_points: nor 置于句首引起部分倒装，were 位于 there 之前。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 labels；were recognised 是被动语态。

expressions.meaning_zh: 广为人知；得到广泛认可

sentences.sentence: The value of a garment was judged by its style and fabric rather than by who made it.
sentences.translation: 一件服装的价值取决于其款式和面料，而不是出自谁手。

structure.text: rather than by who made it

difficult_points: was judged by 是被动结构，这里的 by 引出判断依据而非具体施事者。
who made it 是介词 by 的宾语从句，it 指 a garment。

sentences.sentence: It was regarded as perfectly acceptable, even for high-society women, to approach an unknown tailor who could make a garment for a few rupees, providing the perfect fit, finish and style.
sentences.translation: 即使对上流社会女性而言，找一位不知名的裁缝花几卢比做一件合身、做工精良且有型的衣服，也被认为完全可以接受。

structure.text: It was regarded as perfectly acceptable
who could make a garment for a few rupees
providing the perfect fit, finish and style

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，真正主语是 to approach an unknown tailor。
who 修饰 tailor；providing... 补充说明裁缝做出的服装能够达到的效果。

sentences.sentence: They were proud of getting a bargain, and of giving their own name to the end result.
sentences.translation: 她们以买到便宜货以及把最终成品冠上自己的名字为荣。

structure.text: and of giving their own name to the end result

difficult_points: They 回指前句的 high-society women。
两个 of 短语并列受 were proud 支配，giving A to B 表示把 A 赋予 B。

sentences.sentence: The 1960s was an era full of mischievousness and celebration in the arts, music and cinema.
sentences.translation: 20世纪60年代是一个在艺术、音乐和电影领域充满叛逆趣味与欢庆氛围的时代。

structure.text: full of mischievousness and celebration in the arts, music and cinema

difficult_points: The 1960s 表示一个年代，原文因此使用单数谓语 was。
full of... 是形容词短语，后置修饰 an era。

sentences.sentence: The period was characterised by freedom from restrictions and, in the fashion world, an acceptance of innovative types of material such as plastic and coated polyester.
sentences.translation: 这一时期的特征是摆脱束缚；在时尚界，人们也开始接受塑料和涂层聚酯等创新材料。

structure.text: an acceptance of innovative types of material such as plastic and coated polyester

difficult_points: freedom... 与 an acceptance... 是由 and 连接的两个并列特征。
such as 引出 innovative types of material 的具体例子。

sentences.sentence: Tight-fitting kurtas[1] and churidars[2] and high coiffures were a trend among women.
sentences.translation: 紧身的库尔塔衫[1]、丘里达尔裤[2]以及高耸发型曾是女性中的流行风尚。

structure.text: Tight-fitting kurtas[1] and churidars[2] and high coiffures

difficult_points: 两个 and 串联三个并列主语，脚注标记属于原文词项的一部分。
a trend 使用单数，是把这些搭配整体视作一种潮流。

sentences.sentence: The following decade witnessed an increase in the export of traditional materials, and the arrival in India of international fashion.
sentences.translation: 接下来的十年见证了传统材料出口的增长，也见证了国际时尚进入印度。

structure.text: an increase in the export of traditional materials
and the arrival in India of international fashion

difficult_points: witnessed 以年代作主语，是表示“见证、经历”的拟人化用法。
an increase 与 the arrival 是两个并列宾语；of international fashion 修饰 arrival。

sentences.sentence: Synthetics became trendy, and the disco culture affected the fashion scene.
sentences.translation: 合成材料开始流行，迪斯科文化也影响了时尚界。

structure.text: and the disco culture affected the fashion scene

difficult_points: became 是系动词，trendy 作主语补语。
and 连接两个地位相同、各有主谓结构的分句。

sentences.sentence: It was in the early 80s when the first fashion store 'Ravissant' opened in Mumbai.
sentences.translation: 正是在80年代初，第一家名为“Ravissant”的时装店在孟买开业。

structure.text: when the first fashion store 'Ravissant' opened in Mumbai

difficult_points: It was... when... 是带强调色彩的结构，突出时间 in the early 80s。
'Ravissant' 是 the first fashion store 的同位名称。

sentences.sentence: At that time garments were retailed for a four-figure price tag.
sentences.translation: 当时，服装的零售价已达到四位数。
difficult_points: were retailed 是被动语态，表示服装以某一价格出售。
four-figure 指由四位数字构成的价格，而非某个具体金额。

sentences.sentence: American designers like Calvin Klein became popular.
sentences.translation: 卡尔文·克莱因等美国设计师开始走红。
difficult_points: like Calvin Klein 用于举例，说明 American designers 中的代表。
became popular 强调从不流行到流行的状态变化。

sentences.sentence: In India too, contours became more masculine, and even the salwar kameez[3] was designed with shoulder pads.
sentences.translation: 在印度，服装轮廓也变得更具阳刚气质，甚至连萨尔瓦套装[3]也被设计成带垫肩的样式。

structure.text: and even the salwar kameez[3] was designed with shoulder pads

difficult_points: too 呼应美国时尚对印度产生的同类影响。
was designed 是被动语态，with shoulder pads 表示设计中加入的特征。

sentences.sentence: With the evolution of designer stores came the culture of designer fashion, along with its hefty price tags.
sentences.translation: 随着设计师品牌店的发展，设计师时尚文化及其高昂的标价也随之兴起。

structure.text: With the evolution of designer stores
along with its hefty price tags

difficult_points: 地点或伴随成分置于句首后采用完全倒装，真正主语位于 came 之后。
its 指 designer fashion；along with 补充同时出现的高价标签。

sentences.sentence: Whatever a garment was like, consumers were convinced that a higher price tag signified elegant designer fashion, so garments were sold at unbelievable prices.
sentences.translation: 无论服装本身是什么样，消费者都深信更高的标价意味着高雅的设计师时装，因此服装得以按令人难以置信的价格出售。

structure.text: that a higher price tag signified elegant designer fashion
so garments were sold at unbelievable prices

difficult_points: Whatever... was like 引导让步状语从句，意为“不论……是什么样”。
that 从句说明消费者相信的内容，so 分句给出这种观念导致的结果。

expressions.meaning_zh: 以令人难以置信的价格

sentences.sentence: Meanwhile, designers decided to get themselves noticed by making showy outfits and associating with the right celebrities.
sentences.translation: 与此同时，设计师决定通过制作夺目的服装并与合适的名人交往来吸引关注。

structure.text: by making showy outfits and associating with the right celebrities

difficult_points: get themselves noticed 是 get＋宾语＋过去分词补语，表示让自己受到注意。
by 后有 making 与 associating 两个并列动名词，说明实现方式。

sentences.sentence: Soon, fashion shows became competitive, each designer attempting to out-do the other in theme, guest list and media coverage.
sentences.translation: 很快，时装秀之间竞争激烈，每位设计师都试图在主题、嘉宾名单和媒体报道方面胜过其他设计师。

structure.text: each designer attempting to out-do the other in theme, guest list and media coverage

difficult_points: each designer attempting... 是独立主格结构，补充说明竞争的具体表现。
the other 在此泛指其他竞争设计师；in 后列出三个竞争维度。

sentences.sentence: In the last decade of the millennium, the market shrank and ethnic wear made a comeback.
sentences.translation: 在千禧年前的最后十年，市场萎缩了，民族服饰则重新流行起来。

structure.text: In the last decade of the millennium
and ethnic wear made a comeback

difficult_points: the last decade of the millennium 指20世纪90年代。
and 连接市场萎缩与民族服饰回归两个同期变化。

sentences.sentence: During the recession, there was a push to sell at any cost.
sentences.translation: 经济衰退期间，行业出现了不惜一切代价促销的压力。
difficult_points: there was 是存在句，a push 是真正表达新信息的名词短语。
to sell... 修饰 a push，说明这种推动或压力的具体方向。

sentences.sentence: With fierce competition the inevitable occurred: the once hefty price tags began their downward journey, and the fashion-show industry followed suit.
sentences.translation: 在激烈竞争下，不可避免的事情发生了：曾经高昂的标价开始一路下跌，时装秀行业也随之降温。

structure.text: the once hefty price tags began their downward journey
and the fashion-show industry followed suit

difficult_points: 冒号后的两个分句具体解释 the inevitable 指什么。
followed suit 表示时装秀行业也采取或经历了同样的变化。

expressions.meaning_zh: 跟着采取同样行动；随之变化

sentences.sentence: However, the liveliness of the Indian fashion scene had not ended- it had merely reached a stable level.
sentences.translation: 然而，印度时尚界的活力并未终结——它只是进入了一个稳定阶段。

structure.text: the liveliness of the Indian fashion scene had not ended
it had merely reached a stable level

difficult_points: it 回指 the liveliness of the Indian fashion scene，而非某个具体行业主体。
两个过去完成时说明在后续复苏之前已经出现的状态；原文用 ended- 的单连字符连接解释。

sentences.sentence: At the beginning of the 21st century, with new designers and models, and more sensible designs, the fashion industry accelerated once again.
sentences.translation: 21世纪初，随着新设计师、新模特以及更合理的设计出现，时尚产业再次加速发展。

structure.text: At the beginning of the 21st century
with new designers and models, and more sensible designs

difficult_points: with 短语交代行业再度加速时伴随出现的新条件。
sensible 在此侧重设计更切合实际、更加合理，而非“有感觉的”。

sentences.sentence: As far as the global fashion industry is concerned, Indian ethnic designs and materials are currently in demand from fashion houses and garment manufacturers.
sentences.translation: 就全球时尚产业而言，印度民族设计和材料目前受到时装公司与服装制造商的青睐。

structure.text: As far as the global fashion industry is concerned
from fashion houses and garment manufacturers

difficult_points: As far as... is concerned 是限定讨论范围的固定框架。
in demand from 表示需求来自后面的 fashion houses and garment manufacturers。

sentences.sentence: India is the third largest producer of cotton, the second largest producer of silk, and the fifth largest producer of man-made fibres in the world.
sentences.translation: 印度是世界第三大棉花生产国、第二大丝绸生产国和第五大人造纤维生产国。

structure.text: the third largest producer of cotton, the second largest producer of silk, and the fifth largest producer of man-made fibres

difficult_points: 三个 producer 名词短语并列表语，序数词分别给出世界排名。
largest 前有序数词时表示“第几大”，不是简单最高级。

sentences.sentence: The Indian garment and fabric industries have many fundamental advantages, in terms of a cheaper, skilled work force, cost-effective production, raw materials, flexibility, and a wide range of designs with sequins, beadwork, and embroidery.
sentences.translation: 印度服装和面料产业拥有许多根本优势，包括成本较低且技术熟练的劳动力、具成本效益的生产、原材料、灵活性，以及大量采用亮片、珠饰和刺绣的设计。

structure.text: The Indian garment and fabric industries
in terms of a cheaper, skilled work force, cost-effective production, raw materials, flexibility, and a wide range of designs with sequins, beadwork, and embroidery

difficult_points: in terms of 后的并列清单具体说明 fundamental advantages 的内容。
with sequins, beadwork, and embroidery 后置修饰 designs，说明设计采用的装饰工艺。

sentences.sentence: In addition, that India provides garments to international fashion houses at competitive prices, with a shorter lead time, and an effective monopoly on certain designs, is accepted the whole world over.
sentences.translation: 此外，印度能以有竞争力的价格、更短的交付周期以及对某些设计的实际垄断优势，向国际时装公司供应服装，这一点已获得全世界认可。

structure.text: that India provides garments to international fashion houses at competitive prices, with a shorter lead time, and an effective monopoly on certain designs

difficult_points: that 引导的长从句整体作主语，主句谓语是 is accepted。
at competitive prices 与两个 with 成分共同描述印度供货的优势；the whole world over 意为全世界。

sentences.sentence: India has always been regarded as the default source in the embroidered garments segment, but changes in the rate of exchange between the rupee and the dollar has further depressed prices, thereby attracting more buyers.
sentences.translation: 印度一直被视为刺绣服装领域的首选供应来源，但卢比兑美元汇率的变化进一步压低了价格，从而吸引了更多买家。

structure.text: India has always been regarded as the default source in the embroidered garments segment
but changes in the rate of exchange between the rupee and the dollar has further depressed prices

difficult_points: has been regarded 是现在完成时被动语态，表示长期延续的看法。
thereby attracting... 表示汇率变化压价后带来的结果；原文 changes 与 has 存在主谓数不一致，必须保留。

expressions.text: be regarded as the default source

sentences.sentence: So the international fashion houses walk away with customised goods, and craftwork is sold at very low rates.
sentences.translation: 因此，国际时装公司得以带走定制商品，而手工制品则以极低的价格售出。

structure.text: the international fashion houses walk away with customised goods
and craftwork is sold at very low rates

difficult_points: walk away with 在此表示买方以有利条件获得并带走商品。
is sold 是被动语态，at very low rates 说明出售价格水平。

sentences.sentence: As far as the fabric market is concerned, the range available in India can attract as well as confuse the buyer.
sentences.translation: 就面料市场而言，印度可供选择的品种之丰富既能吸引买家，也可能令买家困惑。

structure.text: As far as the fabric market is concerned
can attract as well as confuse

difficult_points: available in India 是后置形容词短语，修饰 the range。
attract as well as confuse 是共享宾语 the buyer 的并列谓语。

sentences.sentence: Much of the production takes place in the small town of Chapa in the eastern state of Bihar, a name one might never have heard of.
sentences.translation: 大部分生产活动都在比哈尔邦东部的小镇查帕进行，这个地名人们可能从未听说过。

structure.text: in the small town of Chapa in the eastern state of Bihar
a name one might never have heard of

difficult_points: a name... 是 Chapa 的同位说明，其中省略了修饰 name 的关系代词 that。
have heard of 是现在完成时结构；of 的逻辑宾语是被省略的关系代词。

sentences.sentence: Here fabric-making is a family industry; the range and quality of raw silks churned out here belie the crude production methods and equipment.
sentences.translation: 在这里，面料制作是一项家庭产业；当地生产的生丝在品种和质量上都令人难以相信其制作方法和设备竟如此简陋。

structure.text: Here fabric-making is a family industry
the range and quality of raw silks churned out here
the crude production methods and equipment

difficult_points: 分号连接两个关系紧密的独立分句。
churned out here 是过去分词短语，修饰 raw silks；belie 表示实际品质与简陋生产条件不相称。

sentences.sentence: Surat in Gujarat, is the supplier of an amazing set of jacquards, moss crepes and georgette sheers - all fabrics in high demand.
sentences.translation: 古吉拉特邦的苏拉特供应种类惊人的提花布、苔纹绉和乔其薄纱——这些都是需求旺盛的面料。

structure.text: the supplier of an amazing set of jacquards, moss crepes and georgette sheers

difficult_points: 破折号后的 all fabrics in high demand 是对前三类面料的同位概括。
原文在主语 Surat in Gujarat 后使用了非必要逗号，应原样保留。

sentences.sentence: Another Indian fabric design that has been adopted by the fashion industry is the 'Madras check', originally utilised for the universal lungi, a simple lower-body wrap worn in southern India.
sentences.translation: 另一种被时尚界采用的印度面料图案是“马德拉斯格纹”；它最初普遍用于伦吉，这是一种印度南部穿着的简易下身裹布。

structure.text: that has been adopted by the fashion industry
originally utilised for the universal lungi
a simple lower-body wrap worn in southern India

difficult_points: that 引导定语从句修饰 design，has been adopted 是现在完成时被动。
originally utilised... 修饰 Madras check；a simple... 是 lungi 的同位语，worn... 又修饰 wrap。

sentences.sentence: This design has now found its way on to bandannas, blouses, home furnishings and almost anything one can think of.
sentences.translation: 如今，这种图案已经出现在头巾、女衬衫、家居用品以及几乎任何能想到的物品上。

structure.text: on to bandannas, blouses, home furnishings and almost anything

difficult_points: find its way on to 是比喻用法，表示某种设计逐渐被应用到不同物品上。
one can think of 是省略关系代词 that 的定语从句，修饰 anything。

sentences.sentence: Ethnic Indian designs with batik and hand-embroidered motifs have also become popular across the world.
sentences.translation: 带有蜡染和手工刺绣图案的印度民族设计也已风靡全球。

structure.text: Ethnic Indian designs with batik and hand-embroidered motifs

difficult_points: with batik and hand-embroidered motifs 修饰 designs，说明其装饰特征。
have become 是现在完成时，强调从过去到现在形成的流行状态。

sentences.sentence: Decorative bead work is another product in demand in the international market.
sentences.translation: 装饰性珠饰是国际市场上另一种需求旺盛的产品。

structure.text: in demand in the international market

difficult_points: 第一个 in demand 构成形容词性表达，后一个 in the international market 限定市场范围。
another 表明珠饰是前述印度设计之外的又一类受欢迎产品。

expressions.text: in demand in the international market

sentences.sentence: Beads are used to prepare accessory items like belts and bags, and beadwork is now available for haute couture evening wear too.
sentences.translation: 珠子被用来制作腰带、包袋等配饰，如今高级定制晚装也采用珠饰工艺。

structure.text: to prepare accessory items like belts and bags
and beadwork is now available for haute couture evening wear too

difficult_points: are used to prepare 是被动结构，to 不定式说明珠子的用途。
like belts and bags 举例说明 accessory items；too 表示高级定制晚装也在使用珠饰。

sentences.sentence: [1] knee-length tunics
sentences.translation: [1] 长及膝盖的束腰外衣。
difficult_points: 本条是对 kurtas 的脚注释义，不是完整的主谓句。
knee-length 是复合形容词，表示长度达到膝盖。

sentences.sentence: [2] trousers
difficult_points: 本条是对 churidars 的脚注释义，不包含谓语。
trousers 在形式上通常使用复数，表示一条长裤。

sentences.sentence: [3] trouser suit
sentences.translation: [3] 裤装套装。
difficult_points: 本条是对 salwar kameez 的脚注释义，而非完整句子。
trouser 在复合名词 trouser suit 中用作前置定语。
